# GAZE
> GAZE - студия бровей Марии Гусейновой в Сочи. Услуги: коррекция, окрашивание, ламинирование, осветление бровей и депиляция зон на лице. Студия находится в центре Сочи, запись доступна онлайн.

## Main Pages
- [Homepage](https://gaze-beauty.ru/) - Main page for GAZE brow studio in Sochi with services, prices, contacts, booking link, portfolio and reviews.
- [Online booking](https://dikidi.net/#widget=198091) - Appointment booking for GAZE services.

## Services
- Brow correction - Brow shaping without coloring. Price from 1000 RUB.
- Brow correction and coloring - Brow shaping with dye or henna. Price from 1800 RUB.
- Brow correction, coloring and lamination - Complete brow service for shape, color and long-lasting styling. Price from 2300 RUB.
- Brow lamination - Brow lamination with care included. Price from 1000 RUB.
- Brow lightening - Brow lightening with care included. Price from 1000 RUB.
- Facial waxing - Depilation of facial zones. Price from 100 RUB.

## Business Facts
- Brand: GAZE
- Category: BeautySalon / brow studio
- City: Sochi, Russia
- Address: ТЦ Сочи-Магнолия, Курортный проспект, 50, 3 этаж
- Phone: +7 911 380-27-00
- Opening hours: daily 10:00-21:00
